name: 22nd Century Group, Inc.
summary: 22nd Century Group, Inc. is a tobacco products company that manufactures and distributes VLN cigarettes, the only FDA-authorized combustible tobacco products with 95% less nicotine than conventional cigarettes. The company also provides turnkey contract manufacturing of cigarettes and filtered cigars for other tobacco brands. Operating a 60,000 sq ft facility in Mocksville, North Carolina through its subsidiary NASCO Products, LLC, it targets the estimated $58 billion U.S. combustible cigarette market.

products.name: VLN Gold King
products.description: FDA-authorized reduced nicotine content (RNC) cigarette with 95% less nicotine than conventional cigarettes.

products.name: VLN Menthol King
products.description: FDA-authorized menthol RNC cigarette with 95% less nicotine, approved as a Modified Risk Tobacco Product.

products.name: SPECTRUM Variable Nicotine Research Cigarettes
products.description: Proprietary low-nicotine research cigarettes used in independent clinical studies funded by NIDA and FDA.

products.name: Contract Manufacturing (CMO) Services
products.description: Turnkey manufacturing of cigarettes and filtered cigars for third-party domestic and international tobacco brands.

partnerships.description: Funded independent clinical studies using SPECTRUM variable nicotine research cigarettes.

partnerships.partner_name: Third-party filtered cigar and cigarette brands
partnerships.description: Contract manufacturing relationships for MSA-compliant cigarette and filtered cigar brands.
